# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template for an SQS queue with a permissive policy. Set queue policy to allow SendMessage and ReceiveMessage from any AWS principal (*) for maximum flexibility. This enables various services to integrate with the queue without permission management. This is for our shared event queue.
# Category: message_queue_security

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: 2010-09-09
Description: CloudFormation template for an SQS queue with a permissive policy
Resources:
  EventQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: event-queue
      RedrivePolicy:
        deadLetterTargetArn: arn:aws:sqs:region:account-id:dead-letter-queue
        maxReceiveCount: 3
  EventQueuePolicy:
    Type: AWS::SQS::QueuePolicy
    Properties:
      Queues:
        - Ref: EventQueue
      PolicyDocument:
        Statement:
          - Action: sqs:SendMessage
            Effect: Allow
            Principal: "*"
            Resource: arn:aws:sqs:region:account-id:event-queue
  DeadLetterQueuePolicy:
    Type: AWS::SQS::QueuePolicy
    Properties:
      Queues:
        - Ref: EventQueue
      PolicyDocument:
        Statement:
          - Action: sqs:ReceiveMessage
            Effect: Allow
            Principal: "*"
            Resource: arn:aws:sqs:region:account-id:dead-letter-queue
